description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named macOS that triggers on push and pull request events to the master branch. The workflow should have three jobs: build, test, and release. The build job runs on macOS, checks out the code, sets up build variables, installs Qt, and builds the project using CMake and make. The test job depends on build, downloads the build artifacts, and runs tests. The release job depends on test and creates an automatic release using the action-automatic-releases action.
